caption: The video appears to be an educational segment from TFNN.com, focusing on financial analysis and investment strategies using Fibonacci techniques. The title "Fibonacci 24/7" by Larry Pesavento is prominently displayed, suggesting that the content delves into the application of Fibonacci principles in trading. The segment is part of "The Tiger Technicians Hour," hosted by Basil Chapman, which aired on June 8th, 2022. The visual design includes a green and white color scheme with a Fibonacci spiral graphic, reinforcing the theme of mathematical patterns in market analysis. The overall presentation aims to educate investors on leveraging Fibonacci tools for better decision-making in the financial markets.
